/privacy-policy.title: Maily - SaaS Framer Template
/privacy-policy.description: Stay on top of your emails with real-time alerts and AI-powered tags. Organize, collaborate, and grow—all in one place.
p: By using Maily, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

We collect different types of information to provide and improve our Service, including:Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number, or other details you provide when signing up or using the Service.Usage Data: Information about how you access and use the Service, including IP address, browser type, pages visited, and time spent on pages.Cookies and Tracking Data: Cookies or similar technologies to track activity and improve the user experience.

We use the data we collect to provide and maintain the Service, send updates or announcements, analyze user behavior to improve features and performance, and ensure security while preventing unauthorized access.

Your data is never sold or rented.We may share information with trusted service providers who help us operate the Service, such as hosting or analytics platforms.We may also disclose information when required by law or in response to legal requests, or during business transfers like mergers or acquisitions.
We keep your personal information only as long as necessary for the purposes described in this policy or as required by law.Once data is no longer needed, it is securely deleted or anonymized.

Depending on your location, you may have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information, withdraw consent for processing, or file a complaint with a data protection authority.To exercise these rights, contact us at support@maily.io
This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page, along with an updated “Last updated” date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:Email: support@maily.ioTel: +1 (414) 455-3046Address: 123 Maily Lane, San Francisco, CA, USA
